dashboard.subtitle: Here is your business at a glance

leads.title: Leads
leads.subtitle: Every lead, answered in seconds
leads.emptyHint: Point your Zillow, Facebook, and website forms at your intake webhook — new leads get an instant reply automatically.

voice.title: Voice Agents
voice.subtitle: Your 24/7 multilingual calling team
voice.engineHint: Pick the AI brain and voice your agents use on calls — changes apply to new calls instantly.
voice.noCallsHint: Trigger a qualifier call from any lead — the agent qualifies, books, and logs the transcript here.

followup.title: Follow-up Autopilot
followup.subtitle: Sequences that never forget a lead
followup.emptyHint: Create a sequence and every new lead can be nurtured automatically across SMS, WhatsApp, and email.

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.subtitle: WhatsApp, SMS & email in one place

leadEngine.title: Lead Engine
leadEngine.subtitle: Fresh prospects on demand
leadEngine.emptyHint: Scrape FSBO, expired listings, or Google Maps areas — validated prospects flow straight into your pipeline.
leadEngine.personasHint: One-click templates for the top real-estate prospect types. Pick one, choose a city, go.

content.title: Content Studio
content.subtitle: Captions, posts and video on autopilot
content.pendingReview: Publishing pending Meta App Review — scheduled posts are logged by the stub adapter.

agents.title: AI Team
agents.subtitle: 20 specialists working your pipeline
agents.standingBy: All agents standing by — trigger anything and watch them light up
agents.activityHint: Every message, call, scrape, and decision your agents make — as it happens.
agents.noActivity: Nothing yet. Add a lead, start a scrape, or ask the team — activity shows up here live.

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Pick the modules you pay for
billing.mockNote: Stripe key not set — plan changes apply instantly in test mode.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Account, compliance & integrations
settings.providersHint: Click a provider, paste its API key, save — it goes live instantly. No key? It runs in safe test mode.
settings.keySet: A key is saved — paste a new one to replace it
settings.whereKey: Where do I find this key?

assistant.title: CloseFlow Assistant
assistant.subtitle: Type or speak — your agents do the work
assistant.snapshot: I'm watching your account: {{total}} leads total, {{week}} new this week, {{appts}} appointments booked. Ask me anything about it.
assistant.intro: Tell me what you want done — I'll route it to the right agent and you can watch it happen live. I can chain steps too: "find luxury buyers in Miami and email them".
assistant.error: That didn't work — try rephrasing, or say "help" to see what I can do.

welcome.title: Welcome to CloseFlow OS
welcome.body: Think of it as a team of tireless robot helpers for your real-estate business. They answer leads, make calls, follow up, and find new clients — while you watch it all happen live.

leads.title: Every lead answered in seconds
leads.body: When someone asks about a home, your robot replies instantly by text — day or night. Fast replies win deals.

voice.title: AI that talks on the phone
voice.body: Your voice agents call new leads, ask the right questions, and book appointments — in 5 languages. You get the transcript.

leadEngine.title: Find new clients on demand
leadEngine.body: Pick who you want (luxury buyers, FSBO sellers, investors…), pick a city, press go. Fresh prospects flow into your pipeline.

agents.title: Watch your AI team work
agents.body: This page shows every agent and what it's doing right now — glowing green means working. Give the team a goal and watch them decide.

assistant.title: Just say what you want
assistant.body: Press the sparkle button (or Alt+K) and type — or tap the mic and speak. "Call Maria", "find investors in Dubai", "go to settings". Done.

keys.title: Connect your accounts
keys.body: In Settings, paste API keys for Twilio, WhatsApp and more. No keys yet? Everything still works in safe test mode so you can explore.

auth.name: Your name
auth.welcome: Run your entire real estate business on autopilot
auth.tagline: Answer every lead in seconds. Qualify by AI voice. Follow up forever.

common.lockedHint: This module is not in your current plan.
